title: YuanDian Man Cave Neon Sign, Neon Lights for Gamer Room Wall Decor, Gift Ideas for Boys Game Nephew Men Teen Son Grandson
features: UPGRADE GAME ROOM TO THE NEXT LEVEL: Easily make your gaming cave the most epic entertainment center with this stunning neon sign that instantly transforms your space and radiates joy. It makes the perfect addition to your gaming decor and brings a cool touch of color that will SURELY make your gamer buddies envious.

PLUG AND PLAY: USB powered light is plug and play design, compatible with power bank / phone charger / computer and other USB socket. Simply hang the neon gamer sign on a wall and plug in - you are READY to go for the game play with the magical glow vibes.

AWESOME GAMER ROOM DECOR: Add the neon sign as the perfect decoration to match your video game consoles and show off your style as a hardcore gamer. It also makes an ideal gift for Birthday, Christmas and other occasions - GREAT gifts for gamers and tech lovers.

SAFE & DURABLE: Quiet and noise-free, the LED neon tubes do not heat up and are safe to touch. Powered by a USB cord (6.5 ft/2 m), each gamer led sign is handmade and built to last at least 50,000 hours (POWER ADAPTOR NOT INCLUDED).
What You Get: 1 x neon sign, 1 x USB cable, 2 x transparent Hook, and friendly customer service
description: Product Description Looking for a unique and eye-catching way to decorate rooms?The man cave neon sign will definitely impress you! Vibrant neon light creates a dynamic and lively atmosphere that fills every corner and adds a unique atmosphere. Man Cave Neon Sign Create a feeling of vintage Inspired appeal to your den, home, man cave, game room, garage or bar with this neon sign that is sure to make a big impression. The man cave neon sign is uniquely designed to add a touch of personality to any space, whether it's on or off. Adjustable Brightness The acrylic man cave neon signs come with dimmer switch. With 10 brightness levels, simply press the "+"/ "-" button to easily set the brightness, from relaxing background lighting to high-energy mode neon lights, to set the perfect match mood for any occasion. Suitable for Various Occasions Whether for your home, game room, man cave, garage, or bar, this sign looks great in a variety of settings. A Great Gift for Man If you're tired of boring spaces, the man cave neon sign is the perfect choice! It's also an ideal gift for birthdays, Christmas and other celebratory occasions. Collect all the Gamer Stuff, gift them to your friends and neighbors!
